about: Owner and Founder of PvP Empire, responsible for overseeing the server's development, management, and future direction.

Co-Owner of PvP Empire, responsible for helping manage the server's development and future plans. He is also the main coder behind the PvP Empire website, creating and maintaining its systems, while contributing as a builder for the server.

Co-Owner of PvP Empire, responsible for assisting with server development, including building projects and helping create the Duels System alongside Mario34. He contributes to improving the server's features and overall player experience.

Manager of PvP Empire, responsible for assisting with the Duels System and supporting future server projects, including building and development tasks. He also helps maintain the community by moderating players across both the PvP Empire Discord and MultiCraft server.

Administrator of PvP Empire and Secondary Coder, responsible for moderating players and helping maintain the server community. He also contributes to the development of the PvP Empire website, creating features such as the Hall of Fame and Leaderboard pages.

Administrator of PvP Empire and Painter, responsible for assisting with server development through building projects and creating custom item designs for PvP Kits. He helps bring new ideas and visuals to life for the server's unique gameplay experience.

Moderator of PvP Empire, responsible for maintaining a positive community environment by moderating both the MultiCraft server and Discord server. He helps enforce rules, assist players, and ensure a smooth experience for the community.
